tools.name: mimesis_validate
tools.boundary: local validation only; does not prove external adoption

tools.name: mimesis_case_start
tools.purpose: Start a case workspace from one weak artifact.
tools.boundary: starts a case; does not complete proof

tools.name: mimesis_case_check
tools.boundary: local evidence only; not external adoption

tools.name: mimesis_evidence_check
tools.boundary: checks structure; does not create evidence

tools.name: mimesis_release_check
tools.boundary: does not publish, tag, or choose a license

tools.name: mimesis_audit_sources
tools.boundary: reference discipline only; not legal originality proof

tools.name: mimesis_mcp_resources
tools.purpose: Generate the local MCP resource index scaffold.
tools.boundary: does not start a long-running server
